patient_summary:
• 73/Female patient
• Primary Dx: Hyperlipidemia associated with T2DM
• Key Procedures: Ancillary Procedure (LGH KISSEL HILL)
• Active Meds: 2 medications including Atorvastatin, insulin
• Allergies: NKDA
• Critical Labs: Glucose 199 (H 01/11/2021); GFR 50 (A 01/11/2021)
• Key History: Former smoker (cigs 03/22/1971-03/22/1973)
